title: Allow D.El.Ed. Student To Sit For Ist Year Exam: HC
description: The judge is dealing with a writ plea filed by P. Priyanka, who challenged the exclusion of her name despite securing admission and attending classes regularly. According to the petitioner, she qualified in TG DEECET-2025 and obtained admission under spot admissions in August 2025 at St. Marys D.Ed College
